description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a rounded fuselage painted in a weathered orange color, featuring visible patches of wear and chipping. The nose is gray and houses a three-bladed black propeller, while the cockpit is open and centrally located, with a single seat visible inside. The wings are short, straight, and low-mounted, with small, angular winglets and matching orange paint. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all with a slightly angular design. The landing gear consists of two small, fixed wheels positioned beneath the fuselage. The overall appearance suggests a vintage or cartoonish design, suitable for display or playful urban environments.
description: A small, weathered orange airplane with a rounded body, open cockpit, and black propeller, featuring short low-mounted wings and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gray nose, three-bladed black propeller, and symmetrical low-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cockpit, rounded fuselage, and fixed landing gear beneath the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the open cockpit interior.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit opening, and the small wheel under the wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with short, straight wings and small angular winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a three-bladed propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Mid-fuselage, open single-seat cockpit with no canopy.
